name: linear-agent-shell
title: Linear Agent Shell
description: Example block composing LinearShell + GlassAvatar + ThinkingSteps + ThinkingIndicator + Markdown + ClaudeInput. A complete user↔agent conversation surface (turn-taking, completed chain-of-thought, live thinking indicator, Claude-style composer) ready to drop into a Next.js page or layout. Theme-adaptive via nexUI tokens.
